package rulefixtures

import (
	"C"
	"unsafe"
)

// scenario for cgo_string_lifetime: `C.CString(goString)` without a corresponding `C.free` in the same function, or deferred `C.free`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario698Negative(value string) {
	ptr := C.CString(value)
	C.free(unsafe.Pointer(ptr))
}
